productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Navy Blue Top
description: Composition Navy blue top made of 70% cotton and 30% polyester, has poet's sleeves with a black band at the cuff, lace-up closure on the chest, brand badge on the left hem and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Revel in the subtlety of femininity in this soft navy blue top from united colors of benetton. The stylish lace-up closure is unique and adds a pretty touch, while the blended cotton/polyester fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or skirts and sandals. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5.8” and chest 33"
